display_note.title: Regulatory basis note
display_note.body_line_1: Aligned to current official source classes as of May 2026: EU AI Act (Regulation (EU) 2024/1689), FDA QMSR, FDA AI-enabled device guidance themes, and IMDRF SaMD/GMLP frameworks.
display_note.body_line_2: This is a traceability aid, not a compliance or clearance determination.

sources.title: EU AI Act (Regulation (EU) 2024/1689)
sources.notes: Use as legal source text; do not infer application milestones from this field alone.

sources.title: European Commission AI Act timeline and implementation page
sources.notes: Use for application dates and phased implementation context.

sources.title: FDA Quality Management System Regulation (QMSR)
sources.notes: Use for FDA quality-system-aligned structural evidence references.

sources.title: Transparency for Machine Learning-Enabled Medical Devices: Guiding Principles
sources.notes: Use for transparency-oriented note generation, not compliance conclusions.

sources.title: Marketing Submission Recommendations for a Predetermined Change Control Plan for Artificial Intelligence-Enabled Device Software Functions
sources.notes: Use for versioned change evidence and planned modification scaffolding.

sources.title: Software as a Medical Device (SaMD): Clinical Evaluation
sources.notes: Use for evidence family language; do not claim direct clinical validation.

sources.title: Good machine learning practice for medical device development: Guiding principles
sources.notes: Use for lifecycle-discipline and transparency-adjacent references.
